My husband and I are now faced with the disappointment of looking at our home every day, and the cost/anxiety of finding someone else to come and fix what Mr Exterior was unable to complete as promised. Mr Exterior is a nice person to talk with, however the company was unable to provide us with a professionally finished, or properly functioning end result. We are very disappointed about damage that occurred to some personal items, and property while they were working here. The labourer working at our home presented very unprofessionally, and often completed large portions of the work on their own. We did call Mr Exterior and voice our concerns and the owner willingly came back two times to attend to areas of concern.  Various areas are leaking, falling off, not professionally finished etc., however he was unable to complete the tasks professionally. From our experience Mr Exterior would be a fine company to hire for a smaller handyman fix, or an item installation around your home. The job we hired Mr Exterior for consisted of replacing soffit, fascia, eavestrough, new vinyl siding, and installing a new steel roof. We regret our choice to use this company, as we did not receive the quality of finished work we were promised and paid in full for.

Edit: January 2024
The condition of our home continues to deteriorate. Siding is falling off, he attempted to screw right through the siding and our wall to “fix” the problem. Looks horrible AND didn’t work. Areas are leaking, some steel is rippled and coming off along the roof edge, many jagged cuts are visibly worse with time. Please do not use this company to work on your home for any project. They will take your money, yet are not capable of providing a professional finished product.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"FC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsiin7EkCy5FOLoyBbSJZbsj4XOyFaxEOALhWX6o7uwEMYNXep=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Great staff and products and shopped here for many years. One issue ive had for a while is why is the lumber in the yard not covered at the end of every day? It would save the contractor from scrapping the ice from frozen 2x6s. That ice and snow leaves a gap.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ali Tavakoli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMDv8XniVnq6BT5k8szzxfAyvWKqd_fVmx-2rH0pvP2rKon5E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I’ve been to the Home Hardware Building Centre in Picton, and it has that friendly small-town hardware store feeling. Parking is easy — right in front — so grabbing a few supplies is quick. Inside, the store is clean and organized, and the aisles aren’t crowded, which makes it simple to find paint, tools, fasteners, and seasonal items without wandering. Staff here have been genuinely helpful — they actually take a moment to listen to what you’re working on and point you to the right aisle instead of just giving vague directions. All totaled, I was out of there in 5  - 10 min with the screws I needed to complete the install.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matty Dee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7uOEdCDYMvuAOkZ3vW5OjOPWaAAylLwviFiVvafGJJ-HeM_JDmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful modern store. He worked efficiently, safely, and was easy to deal with. A huge weight off our shoulders now having this task completed! If you have a pending “handy man” project at your house don’t hesitate to call him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kirk Parker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzbKXS47k2zIygpWSmCO8ciyB9fYgVd-KiNyCC1Teb5GzoHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In Spring of ‘24, I had a great first meeting with Kieran onsite to discuss building a 10’ x 20’ chicken run, framing only w/metal roof, one set of sliding barn doors for access - hardware cloth wrap provided by me. The run was to be added to one end of a pre-existing hen house (Mennonite shed) and included painting of both finished structures. After some follow-up, I received my initial quote for a 10’ x 12’ run at $6.9K. I informed Kieran of the incorrect size in the quote and hoped it was a merely a typo. When he indicated he would need to adjust the quote, I expressed my concern with the existing quote and asked that he investigate ways we could bring costs down as he did so. We had some brief back and forth discussion about ways to accomplish that goal. At the close of that discussion, he still seemed excited about the job and promised to get back to me in a few days with some suggestions and a revised quote. I never heard back from him until he had trouble making eye contact as my server at Hartley’s Tavern six months later, where he said nothing of his failure to get back to me.

EDIT: After seeing the above review, Kieran texted me personally to ask that I remove it. I feel no need to do so, nor do I feel the need to address his response, which has been edited more than once here to fit his narrative. My review is a truthful and accurate account of my experience with Callan Contracting. I believe it to be necessary to balance the other 5-star reviews, especially in light of the fabricated facts and lack of accountability Kieran chose to respond with here and via text, which I’d be happy to share. As a consumer, you are free to make your own decision of course. Personally, I feel better equipped to do that with all the facts. As is clear from my review and at least one other, not everyone is privy to 5-star treatment. Sometimes ya just get left hangin’. Consider yourself advised.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oksana Gurba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI45ljjRPsV72Y6-33ZfygZEQBrOhcsJzT7XhfIIrxEgonSe5PC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had some work done by Callan General Contracting, and very pleased with the results! They also left the area clean and tidy, which I really appreciated.

I would definitely recommend their services to anyone looking for reliable and skilled handyman work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Jane Podnieks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwLJgoHLekVx3scKWt7YDUoVEGmQaazgh0FQXOT6JWpyEyng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kieran has done quite a few jobs at our place such as ceiling repair,  painting and some woodworking. I am extremely happy with the company Clean Comfort Home Improvements.
They shingled my Home. From start to finish, Shawn and his crew was professional, efficient, and very respectful. They treated my home like it was their own, paying attention to detail and leaving everything neat and clean when the job was done. The crew was also kind and easy to communicate with, which made the whole process stress-free. I truly appreciate their hard work and quality craftsmanship. I would highly recommend Clean Comfort to anyone looking for reliable and trustworthy roofing services.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCAOzNH9wytVRgwYwJm_qQT&fid=0x0:0xf19b2a5ca7d2710c"],"When":"2025-8-16"},{"Name":"Melissa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmFE-kq5gN-UfCkGoOrI2pwgu-QyWN5pNWTq7tI55vIzTVpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Better late than never!
It is with great pleasure that I was fortunate enough to connect with this company… from the first contact with Matthew Desveaux explaining the process of how to commence with modern technology to enable him to make a plan and estimate for my roof… he had the patience and empathy of a Saint with me …( I didn’t grow up with the technology ) he endured many phone call conversations with me , all the while he was pulled over to the curb !
This company showed even more devotion to my situation regarding a deadline to complete and completely clean up after the job was completed… Shawn and his crew endured the worst of the August 2025 heatwave, they never stopped even at my request to please come off the roof and take a break… I was truly worried about the guys well being!!!
What a great, very respectful hard working group of guys. I do believe that they all deserve a raise $ …
A superior job Well Done By a Superior Company With Superior Employees - just in time for my daughter’s  wedding the very next day!!
I was so impressed with this company that I asked them to do a second roofing job plus complete eave’s troughs job on my Father’s home on Wolfe Island, again the highest of expertise by Matthew, Shawn and his crew Did Not Disappoint!!! Absolutely perfect work and superior service and quality!
My Father and I will never look elsewhere and highly recommend this company and their dedication and devoted staff!
Thank You Matthew, Shawn, crews, and office staff! You are the Best!
Melissa","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Freddy Hubert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJphfPDwRjX9mHrw2pSM-hAp0zzeToRsNnuHL3uxGyI4aYUJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Clean Comfort Homes did an amazing job on our roof! From start to finish, they were professional, friendly, and super efficient. The crew showed up on time, worked hard, and made sure everything was done perfectly. They cleaned up so well afterward that you’d never even know they’d been there except for the beautiful new roof. The quality of their work is outstanding, and the whole process was stress-free. I’d definitely recommend Clean Comfort Homes to anyone looking for a reliable and trustworthy roofing company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephane Lauzon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV56eF3oxdDjr4fa_mGO0XWbAjxDMw387_f7l4E-5pLRPZe5mdX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I had Clean Comfort Home Improvement come out for a suspected ice dam or exhaust vent flashing issue that was causing a leak. The technician, Steve, showed up the very next day, quickly diagnosed the problem, and repaired it at no cost. He was extremely friendly, professional, and honest throughout the whole process. It’s hard to find service like this these days. Highly recommend Clean Comfort Home Improvement for any roofing needs!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Phillip Alderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGWEjprpZVi1UO-3-2M4xEJIcfRshE_2sjycFxmUjIVJINCA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We used Clean Comfort after we noticed a leak coming from the roof. They were absolutely wonderful to work with! Matt desveaux was so knowledgeable and made sure we had all the info before deciding on our next roof. They helped take care of the leak while waiting for supplies to arrive. Not long after Shawn and his team were so efficient with getting the roof up and took care of all the cleanup within a day. Would definitely recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsqAui3teusRDR0ZZTeuo_2nJ-NPVHqwLh8NAVpiK9zkjDHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This company is outstanding. The level of craftsmanship and customer service is second to none. Our project started as a simple roof replacement on an old cottage. However, once the old roof started coming off we discovered five layers of roofing and an eight inch dip on the middle of the roof. Clean Comfort saved us from what would have been a roofing nightmare. Carpenters fixed the dip and even changed the pitch on a flat section. Blayne the owner is extremely knowledgeable and was a pleasure to work with. He patiently took the time to find options that worked best for our project and budget. It turned out significantly better than we ever expected! We are in awe. Clean Comfort is by far the best company we have ever hired for home renovations. The before and after pictures I posted speak for themselves. We are so fortunate to have picked this company!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdxM2DNA&fid=0x0:0xf19b2a5ca7d2710c"],"When":"2024-2-12"},{"Name":"Lisa Gordon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLv8TSEoLWnZKHcLKcdgXHKKrKaygC9lZPSkdAw_E9oHYt40A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Clean Comfort completely renovate the exterior of our cottage, and we couldn’t be happier with the results! The work was finished efficiently, and we had complete trust in the team from start to finish. Highly recommend Clean Comfort for anyone looking for quality, professionalism, and reliability!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Charles Macdonald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8g9hFGotjWAA8T6jOfV7L8xrUrE_73F08SkS4dB1rlOjgGw0P=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm just had my roof replaced by this company. From start to finish they were courteous, competent and excellent communicators. Little things matter. They thoroughly cleaned my property upon completion of the work, ensuring that there was no debris left in the driveway or yard. I would like to take this opportunity to endorse them and recommend them to anyone who needs roof repairs or a replacement. Thank you Rick and team!
Charles Macdonald","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin George","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTzU0v-t2ZMTHD13KqMKb2l3pqpwpDs9KpKfJ2pzfFu2z4ag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Rick in regards to our steel roof having a loose panel due to a heavy wind storm.  He made a point of coming to our home the very next morning.  Not only did he repair the damaged panel but did a full inspection of the roof and tightened down other panels.  Great service.  Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Troy Whalen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpW_hkU_1FT6ZNJ1qd9mMMVOr3jL8IW3tZNjLuGgGaIgwTDpRc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had them quote my roof for replacement, we own an old farmhouse with several additions so it has multiple different angles and slopes.  He quoted us a great price so we contracted them to do the roof.  When they finally showed up to do the job the crew complained that the newest section of the roof was all icewater shield and was too hard to remove.  They left after being up on the roof for a few hours and the owner Rick ghosted us from that point on.

I eventually had a different company come out and they did an incredible job, nor did they have any problems removing the icewater shield.  I have a feeling someone priced himself too low and then was looking for a way to weasel out of the deal.

I would not recommend this company.  Poor business practice from my personal experience and likely saved myself future headaches if their quality of work is equal to this.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Georgene MacDonald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuf-A-bvLNfCobScvbNEXbe5u706lUfDmUEXFUQi73FJKsPB-B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired R and R Roofing after researching shingles and looking for a contractor certified to install the brand of shingles we had selected. Working with R and R Roofing was an excellent experience. The work started on schedule. The crew was very professional and hardworking, changing their work hours to accommodate bad weather, so at no time our house was exposed to rain without protection. We live on an island, and they had to manage ferry schedules and a long commute, but they showed up daily shortly after dawn. The crew took the time to clean up each day, and treated our property with respect. We have a very steep roof, and we appreciated hearing the supervisor speak about safety and proper management of tools to ensure there were no accidents. We definitely recommend R and R Roofing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Byrne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLlOzqVKDGW2sWMxnTJCeTdUVTitrTCjYl9BluA2fdH7bE6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Called RnR as I was recommended them online as I was late in the season and had a roof leak. They came out right away and assessed and said they would do their best to fit me in before the end of the season as I needed a new roof and it was a very large project. Totally understandable as it it is late in the season and I waited way too long to contact a roofer. They just finished my roof and it looks spectacular. I cannot say enough about the folks that work for RNR. Highly recommend choosing this company for your next project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Potter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6gbta0LpIUHwgIWuFjLr4M17MHSyOeK5yfDeB0JMxzXHj=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They did a great job for us at a reasonable price. [{"Name":"Brenda Eakins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLS3BrN7Re1dJFYXbVEQhgB3XF3sUnIqR5c4QSAUCv2k3fiDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was referred to Kirk whose work Kirks team had recently completed. I asked about rubber roofing in slate design, made here in Canada, in Alberta, made from recycled tires.  He went above & beyond to procure the product & his team did an awesome job of install on my verandah roof including a difficult install on the witches hat. The team was polite and cleaned up well after each day.  I cant wait to have them back next year to do my other roof.
By the way it took 100 recycled tires to complete this beautiful roof, lifetime roofing, no dents like metal and it really looks like slate!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCjaFeL4MNwN_ivZC7GiVqe&fid=0x0:0xbdd6daecca84fc74"],"When":"2025-7-21"},{"Name":"Robert Citro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXap0hSmNUX8Nv-E3T2-YS9LOjUqRwggMJa3yde-w9N_TQY6dyJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bambrough Roofing did an incredible job of replacing our fascia. For years, our original aluminum fascia kept getting blown off due to high winds. Kirk was very professional and helped us through the process of choosing metal fascia and he set our minds at ease. He was an excellent communicator throughout the job and we were very impressed with the final results. Great company to work with!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"CarrieandBrian Porter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVv-a0bbhYLOPWtxzM1bXXYjazubq1KTOFh0e9wrI7Q6DY8-qc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were referred to Kirk a few years ago when we needed an emergency roof repair after a big wind storm on another property. He was prompt and the repair has held up very well. This summer we approached Kirk about replacing our 20+ year old roof on our house. He was excellent. Communication was clear and professional. Kirk’s team did a great job and we were very pleased. It’s also nice to support a local business rather than a big operation from the City.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brent Eakins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVG_RdCcEUcvWkm57SdnC8a4JLdfK9QtGekZDLsKbnqYi20HWTYeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kirk and his team put a beautiful steel roof on my house. They worked though some of the worst weather and showed up on days that I figured they wouldn't want to be up on a roof working. The service was great. Kirk was always timely in responding to messages.
Excellent service and will recommend to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sean Bochniak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxGtVI2fqq8BKYor31YOZj_0qO9KS033MjRgb5W_Eap8umeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent job done. Kirk and his staff are great to deal with, timely and very professional. Very pleased with the new roof.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manfred Schumann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhWazQF7atFjPMZP7CgLfT4XNEU4ijfMen2Wfsv_Dl_RrdPZNvYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can't say enough good things about Kirk and his installers. The satisfying experience starts the moment Kirk responds to a call, and when it comes to follow up and inquires as things progress, he couldn't be more responsive and informative. I bet every job has its moments and changes on the fly, and in our case, Kirk was completely and cheerfully accommodating, which is probably a rare quality indeed. The guys work like they care and it shows when the job is complete...and they clean up nicely too! This was our 3rd reroofing over the years so we've had something to compare this one to and we unreservedly recommend  Bamborough Roofing heads above the others.
When you need a roofer, give Kirk a call, and you'll come to understand our satisfaction with Bamborough Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jay Wilton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgBEDS-TQprJpvvnxGc2dWXLIlXwF6R9VTlwRE92Xetu36uQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kirk came to my house to fix a small leak. He explained the temporary fix and explained what needed to be done and how long it would last. My wife and I decided to replace the entire roof to stay worry free instead of having more repairs in the near future. The crew was on time, very clean and polite. They enjoyed the coffees we provided. They work so hard. We recomend Bambrough roofing for any task. Thank you Kirk and crew.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sam Wiggans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLn8_cuLt2T89NdsWFbCjqHkORchIuAPFS-dnYAb-vfig0uKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic company. [{"Name":"Petr Trávník","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgcVXOgN_rGB_pQGvuEFX3Fq7M2MHtgoTm3vqunSNvA5yGitM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We’ve been in contact with this company since April 2025, finalized our quote and paid the deposit on June 6th, with a clear agreement that the full roofing and exterior siding job would be completed during the summer.
As of mid-November, the roof and exterior insulation have finally been done — but the siding installation still hasn’t even started. Despite repeated promises from their representative to provide a firm installation date or at least proof that the siding materials were ordered, we’ve received no updates, no timeline, and no accountability.
Communication has been very difficult throughout — constant excuses, missed follow-ups, and no proactive effort to resolve delays. With winter now setting in, we are genuinely worried about potential weather damage to our newly renovated house due to the unfinished exterior.
Unfortunately, based on our experience, I would not recommend this company to anyone looking for reliable timelines or professional communication.

Mar 2026 update:

The siding portion of our project was formally cancelled in November 2025, and a refund (20k+) was requested for the uncompleted work. As of March 2026, the matter remains unresolved and the deposit has not been returned.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUL0OivziS9s1T1jRQVbJwrOgZ3e3D8NS46MsCrJ5m4yXDLpiY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Replaced asphalt shingles on  1100 sq. ft. bungalow.

Originally, he estimated the job could be done around May or June, but with the weather looking iffy, he rearranged his schedule and was able to fit us in almost immediately. He said if he put his full team on it, they could get it done in just two days. The pricing was very fair for the quality of materials and workmanship.

His crew was respectful, hardworking, and focused—no long breaks, just solid work. The cleanup afterward was excellent, and the entire process was completed within 8 days.

title: JM Roof Company
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Erica S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF6Sc9kCCp0WZooMQ7N-6tfQtwfnWsXvtB0YNo5CSv_hSj7AI7pg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Last year's snowfall wreaked havoc on our roof.
Justin came out to see what the situation was. He did a thorough inspection and provided quotes for 2 types of roof systems, explaining them in detail. This helped greatly in making the decision.
We made our decision, booked our time and experienced solid communication from Justin leading up to the install.
When the big day came, the team arrived early, introduced themselves and kept communication up during the process. This left us informed and the questions we did have were answered professionally and personally.
Justin, big thanks to you and your team for doing such a great job! We are 3 months post-install and not only has the product (steel) and workmanship held beautifully against the weather, we have received many compliments.
I'm very happy with the product and the team who installed.
If we ever have another project like this, we will be reaching out.
Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Crane Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWn39jb9WnkjXph11EO05bK_RyC8fmy9DvbbfVua78aR2WyXWE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Justin's JM Roof Company is fantastic and I recommend them very, very highly.

I reached out to a number of roofing companies to install a new roof at our lakeside cottage.  JM Roof Company was the only company where the owner of the company, Justin, personally got back to me.  All other companies had their sales representatives reach out.

Just was incredibly professional at every stage of the process.  His original quote was delivered promptly and with excellent detail.  I had a few questions on the quote which he answered clearly.  Leading up to the project, Justin communicated regularly on the start time.

The job itself was very well done and our roof looks amazing.  And our property was left tidier than it was when they started.  Justin himself searched the perimeter of our cottage with a metal detector to make sure not a single roofing nail was left on the ground.

Justin then followed up a couple of times after the project was complete to make sure everything was good and to see if there was anything more that he could do for us.  Incredible service.

Thank you Justin for our beautiful new roof and the excellent experience every step of the way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJyda-rQE&fid=0x0:0xdd02678b07c8acf5"],"When":"2023-7-19"},{"Name":"Janice Andrews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwrtbfLxQII2HSTlW0uZfplIwscArQb6cgH9ZoFGlHexZGCw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JM Roof Company completed our roof replacement, including many difficult valleys and a dormer.  The service was professional yet personal.  Justin and his team were a pleasure to deal with, friendly and very hard working, always prompt with any questions and the work was completed in a timely manner.  Their experience and expertise was evident and I highly recommend this company for any roofing project!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Brooks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqp5cCpzVQmp77QpWNdoUXjDOAdfZhx1esAUL97jvXgyKfew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We  had JM Roof Company do our shingled roof and it was without a doubt one of the best experiences we could have expected.  Justin's crew was punctual,  friendly and efficient .  The customer service was outstanding.   We would highly recommend.   Thank you Justin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ron Woolsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYfbrJhrnuSa6b5mE1JACK1OgLe-VC9yZ85qMNYbOulLiJ-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We contracted Justin and his team to complete roofs on three family cottages. The workers were competent, professional, friendly and our properties were left clean and tidy.

One of the best contracting experiences I have ever had. Highly recommend JM Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Chambers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjO-n51OdEz9WB6SCnW65UyikahYFzFz2BV36-wY8lGlWzlB27=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JM Roof Company did an excellent job on my roof. Justin was very quick with communication about the job and very open to any questions I had.

Highly recommend using JM Roofing for your home!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dorrie Brenneman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuROYGh_CVqHljc35tp2HLeJTb5UpMNh5AD_sXUvxWBQdz-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had our porch roofs (2) and detached garage roof replaced.
